title: Octatrack Tutorial #1 - CUCKOO
creator: Cuckoo
description: Cuckoo's first Octatrack tutorial covering basic navigation, hardware overview, and first steps. Made with newcomers in mind for a machine with a LOT of possibilities.
notes: Foundational tutorial by one of the most respected Octatrack educators. MK1-focused but all core concepts apply to MK2.

title: OCTATRACK Tutorial #2 - sampling
creator: Cuckoo
description: Easy sampling for total beginners. Features sampling from PO-12 and vinyl. Goal is quick basic understanding from day one with very little or no prior Elektron experience.
notes: Excellent entry point for sampling. Very beginner-friendly, shows real-world workflow with external audio sources.

title: Octatrack MKII Cuckoo Heavily Edited Performance
creator: Cuckoo
description: Cuckoo creates a song/jam with the Octatrack MKII, heavily edited from a 48-minute session down to 9 minutes. Samples and builds up a track from scratch.
verifiedSource: Elektronauts curated list, confirmed via forum discussion
notes: Great for seeing MKII in action and understanding what's possible. Inspirational rather than step-by-step tutorial.

title: Octatrack Pickup machine (Looper)
creator: Cuckoo
description: Tutorial on setting up the Octatrack for loopbox style jamming with pickup machines. Covers multi-track loop box recording for beginners.
notes: Essential for understanding pickup machines and live looping workflow.

title: Elektron - Octatrack MKII
creator: Elektron
description: Elektron's official Octatrack MKII introduction video. Overview of the hardware, new features, and what makes it a limitless performance sampler.
notes: Official Elektron video. Short but gives a good first look at the MKII hardware.

title: Octatrack Know-How — Lesson #1: Sets, Audio Pool & Projects
creator: Elektron
description: Official Elektron Know-How series. Lesson 1 covers the foundational hierarchy: Sets, Audio Pool, and Projects. Essential for understanding file organization.
notes: Part of official 9-lesson Know-How series by Elektron. MK1 but structure is identical on MK2.

title: Octatrack Know-How — Lesson #2: Selecting A Machine & Assigning Samples
creator: Elektron
description: Official Elektron Know-How Lesson 2. How to select Flex, Static, Thru, and Neighbor machines and assign samples to tracks.
notes: Directly relevant to understanding machine types. Official source, accurate menu paths.

title: Octatrack Tutorial: Parts and Patterns
creator: Merlin (Community)
description: Clear tutorial explaining how Parts and Patterns work together. Covers Part assignment to patterns, how changing parts affects all patterns sharing that part.
notes: Essential for understanding the Parts/Patterns relationship, which is one of the most confusing concepts for beginners.

title: Record Trigs and Resampling
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Tutorial covering recorder trigs and resampling techniques. How to set up record trigs for automatic sampling and internal resampling workflows.
notes: Key tutorial for learning resampling, one of the Octatrack's most powerful features.

title: Sampling Made Easy
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Beginner-friendly tutorial making sampling on the Octatrack approachable. Covers the basics of recording and editing samples.
notes: Good companion to Cuckoo's Tutorial #2 for additional sampling perspectives.

title: Going Dawless with the Octatrack | Electronic Music Without A Laptop | Thomann
creator: Thomann
description: Thomann's guide to going DAWless with the Octatrack. Covers setup, workflow, and making electronic music without a laptop.
notes: Good overview for understanding the Octatrack's role in a dawless setup.

title: Octatrack Tutorial Video: Mixer, FX Box, External Remixer!
creator: Community Tutorial
description: How to use the Octatrack as a mixer, FX processor, and external remixer using Thru machines. Covers routing external audio through OT effects.
notes: Excellent for understanding Thru machines and using OT as an effects processor for external gear.

title: 4 things to know about the Octatrack... (Late Night Tips)
creator: Late Night Tips
description: Four essential things every Octatrack user should know. Beginner-friendly tips from the Late Night Tips series covering common workflow advice.
notes: Good quick overview. Late Night Tips series has excellent, focused Octatrack content.

title: Octatrack Workflow #2: Echo Freeze (Late Night Tips)
creator: Late Night Tips
description: Deep dive into the Echo Freeze effect on the Octatrack. One of the most powerful and creative effects available.
notes: Echo Freeze is one of the OT's signature effects. Essential knowledge for creative performance.

title: Octatrack Workflow #14: Top 4 Effects (Late Night Tips)
creator: Late Night Tips
description: Late Night Tips picks the top 4 most useful and creative effects on the Octatrack with demonstrations and use cases.
notes: Great reference for which effects to focus on first. Saves time by highlighting the most impactful ones.

title: Octatrack Workflow #6 Playing Live p.1 (Late Night Tips)
creator: Late Night Tips
description: Part 1 of playing live with the Octatrack. Covers scene setup, crossfader techniques, and live performance workflow.
notes: Essential for live performance preparation. Covers scene/crossfader techniques.

title: Octatrack Workflow #8 Playing Live p.2 (Late Night Tips)
creator: Late Night Tips
description: Part 2 of playing live with the Octatrack. Covers pattern transitions, arrangement techniques, and advanced live strategies.
notes: Follow-up to Part 1. Together they form a comprehensive live performance guide.

title: Octatrack Trig Conditions (Late Night Tips)
creator: Late Night Tips
description: Explanation of all trig conditions on the Octatrack: FILL, PRE, NEI, percentage-based probability, and A:B patterns.
notes: Trig conditions add massive variation to patterns. Essential for making sequences feel alive.

title: Octatrack Workflow #7: Resampling (Late Night Tips)
creator: Late Night Tips
description: Late Night Tips covers Octatrack resampling workflow. How to capture and manipulate internal audio for creative sound design.
notes: Resampling is one of the OT's killer features. This tutorial makes it accessible.

title: Jamming with Slices (Octatrack Tutorial) = Ned Rush
creator: Ned Rush
description: Ned Rush demonstrates live jamming with sliced samples on the Octatrack. Shows creative slice manipulation in real-time.
notes: Ned Rush's tutorials are highly creative and show advanced slice techniques in musical context.

title: Conditional Amen Break Glitching Octatrack = Ned Rush
creator: Ned Rush
description: Using conditional trigs with sliced Amen breaks for glitchy, ever-evolving breakbeat patterns. Combines trig conditions with slice manipulation.
notes: Advanced technique combining two powerful OT features. Excellent for breakbeat and jungle producers.

title: Granular Crossfades (Octatrack Tutorial) = Ned Rush
creator: Ned Rush
description: Ned Rush demonstrates granular-style crossfades using the Octatrack's scene system. Creative sound design through crossfader modulation.
notes: Shows the Octatrack's potential for granular-like effects. Advanced but inspiring.

title: Thru Machine Basics
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Basic setup and usage of Thru machines on the Octatrack. How to route external audio through OT effects in real-time.
notes: Essential for anyone wanting to process external synths or audio through the Octatrack.

title: Gains, Volumes, and Levels
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Understanding gain staging on the Octatrack. How VOL, LEV, DIR, and other level controls interact across the signal chain.
notes: Crucial for clean mixes. Poor gain staging is one of the most common issues for beginners.

title: Gains, Volumes, and Levels (Part 2)
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Part 2 of the gain staging tutorial. Advanced level management and headroom optimization across multiple tracks.
notes: Follow-up to Part 1. Together they give a complete picture of OT gain staging.

title: Octatrack Tutorial Video: Sidechain pumping effect!
creator: Community Tutorial
description: How to create a sidechain pumping effect on the Octatrack. Creative use of the compressor and LFO for that classic dance music pump.
notes: Classic technique for dance/electronic music. EZBOT also has a sidechain tutorial worth checking.

title: Octatrack Tutorial Video: Freeze Delay + Looper Delay!
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Tutorial on Freeze Delay and Looper Delay effects. Two powerful delay modes for creative performance and sound design.
notes: Freeze delay is one of the OT's most unique effects. Great for live performance.

title: Octatrack Tutorial Video: Tape Stop Effect!
creator: Community Tutorial
description: How to create a tape stop effect on the Octatrack. Classic DJ/production technique for transitions and builds.
notes: Quick and practical. Useful DJ-style effect for live performance.

title: Octatrack FX Send Tutorial
creator: Community Tutorial
description: How to use the Octatrack's CUE output as an FX send for parallel effects processing. Essential routing technique for advanced mixing.
notes: CUE-as-send is a powerful routing trick. Adds reverb/delay sends without using up track effect slots.

title: Octatrack Tutorial Video: Looper!
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Tutorial on using the Octatrack as a looper with Flex machines and recorder trigs. Alternative to pickup machines for looping.
notes: Different approach to looping than pickup machines. More flexible but requires more setup.

title: Octatrack MK2 Tutorial: A Guide to Pickup Machines
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Comprehensive guide to Pickup Machines on the Octatrack MK2. Setup, usage, and creative applications for live looping.
notes: MK2-specific pickup machine tutorial. More recent than Cuckoo's loopbox tutorial.

title: How To: Live Loop with the Octatrack Using Pickup Machines (in 7 min)
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Quick 7-minute guide to live looping with Pickup Machines. Fast, focused tutorial for getting up and running.
notes: Perfect for quick reference. Gets you looping in 7 minutes.

title: Octatrack Xfader Transition Trick
creator: Community Tutorial
description: The classic crossfader transition trick: record current mix, crossfade to recording, switch patterns, crossfade back for seamless transitions.
notes: THE essential live performance trick. Enables seamless pattern transitions without audio gaps.

title: Octatrack Xfader Transition Trick Variations
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Variations on the crossfader transition trick. Multiple approaches to seamless live transitions between patterns and sections.
notes: Builds on the basic transition trick with more advanced variations.

title: Octatrack - 64 breakbeat x 16 slices megabreak of doom
creator: Community Tutorial
description: 64 breakbeats combined into a single sample chain with 16 slices each. Demonstrates the power of sample chains and slice grids for beat chopping.
notes: Shows the extreme potential of sample chains. Inspiring for beat-makers and breakbeat enthusiasts.

title: Octatrack mk2 Tutorial: Octatrack + Ableton Workflow Tips
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Tips for integrating the Octatrack MK2 with Ableton Live. Covers exporting loops, sync, and hybrid DAW/hardware workflows.
notes: Directly relevant for Rishaal's Ableton-to-Octatrack workflow. Covers the export and integration pipeline.

title: Octatrack Know-How — Lesson #7: Trig Modes
creator: Elektron
description: Official Elektron Know-How Lesson 7 covering trig modes: standard, one-shot, and micro-timing. Essential sequencing concepts.
notes: Part of official Elektron series. Trig modes are fundamental for sequencing and resampling workflows.

title: Octatrack mk2 Tutorial - My Live Performance Setup
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Complete walkthrough of a live performance setup using the Octatrack MK2. Covers routing, template design, and performance workflow.
notes: Practical real-world setup guide. Shows how to structure a complete performance-ready configuration.

title: Octatrack Mk2 Tutorial: A Crash Course in Arrangements
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Crash course on using the Octatrack MK2's Arranger mode. How to chain patterns, set up song structures, and build complete arrangements.
notes: MK2-specific arranger tutorial. More recent complement to Cuckoo's arranger tutorial.

title: Octatrack Mk2 Tutorial - Turning Samples into Synths 101
creator: Community Tutorial
description: How to turn samples into playable synthesizer-like instruments using single-cycle waveforms, loop points, and creative parameter locking.
notes: Pushes the OT beyond sampling into synthesis territory. Creative and inspiring approach.

title: Octatrack Basics: My Two Most Important Button Combos
creator: Community Tutorial
description: The two most essential button combinations every Octatrack user needs to know. Quick, practical beginner tips for faster navigation.
notes: Quick win for beginners. Knowing key button combos dramatically speeds up workflow.

title: How to DJ with the Elektron Octatrack Tutorial - Part #1
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Part 1 of using the Octatrack as a DJ tool. Covers loading tracks, timestretching to match BPMs, and using the crossfader for mixing.
notes: Shows OT as a DJ tool. Relevant for understanding timestretching and crossfader in a mixing context.

title: How to DJ with the Elektron Octatrack Tutorial - Part #2
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Part 2 of the DJ tutorial. Advanced mixing techniques, effects usage during DJ sets, and performance tips.
notes: Continuation of Part 1. Together they show the OT as a complete DJ tool.

title: Creating Polyrhythms with the Elektron Octatrack
creator: Community Tutorial
description: How to create polyrhythmic patterns using individual track lengths on the Octatrack. Each track can have a different length for evolving patterns.
notes: Great for making patterns feel more organic and less repetitive.

title: Octatrack MK2 Tip: Chaining Multiple Patterns
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Quick tip on chaining multiple patterns together on the Octatrack MK2 for longer compositions without using the Arranger.
notes: Simple but essential technique for building longer sequences.

title: Hyper FX Template - Punch In Effects for Octatrack
creator: EZBOT
description: EZBOT's Hyper FX template demo. Showcases glitchy, lo-fi, and punch-in effects designed for live performance on the Octatrack.
notes: Great for learning creative effect design. Shows how templates can turbocharge performance workflow.

title: How I Use The Octatrack For Techno At A Live Show
creator: EZBOT
description: EZBOT shares a live example of using the Octatrack as a performance mixer at a techno show. Real-world performance breakdown.
notes: Excellent professional-level performance workflow. Shows how all pieces come together in a real live set.

title: Elektron Octatrack MK2 Live Resampling
creator: Dataline
description: Dataline's tutorial on live resampling with the Octatrack MK2 featuring the Roland TB03 and TR09. Explains machine connections, setup, and live sampling configuration.
notes: Dataline (Cenk Sayinli) is an Elektron expert. Advanced resampling tutorial with real hardware integration.

title: Review: Octatrack at year 8 - Is it still worth it?
creator: Loopop
description: Loopop's comprehensive review of the Octatrack 8 years after release. Covers 10 key features and compares with competitors like Deluge and MPC Live.
notes: Excellent overview of what makes the OT special. Great for understanding its unique strengths.

title: Ableton Live - Sample Chain Making (for Octatrack)
creator: Community Tutorial
description: How to create sample chains in Ableton Live for the Octatrack. Covers concatenating samples and creating .ot metadata files.
notes: Directly relevant for Ableton-to-Octatrack workflow. Sample chains maximize OT slot efficiency.

title: Octatrack: Conditional Pattern Variations (Late Night Tips)
creator: Late Night Tips
description: Using conditional trigs to create pattern variations that evolve over time. Makes simple patterns sound complex and alive.
notes: Companion to the trig conditions tutorial. Shows practical musical applications.

title: Octatrack MK2 Tip: Pausing and Resuming Tracks
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Quick tip on pausing and resuming individual tracks on the Octatrack MK2. Useful performance technique for building tension.
notes: Simple but effective performance technique.

title: Octatrack Performance Features Casual Walkthrough
creator: Community Tutorial
description: Casual walkthrough of the Octatrack's performance features including scenes, crossfader, mutes, and live sampling.
notes: Relaxed exploration of performance features. Good for getting comfortable with live manipulation.

title: Free Octatrack Tutorials List + Live Setups & Performances Examples
creator: Elektronauts Community
description: Community-curated megathread on Elektronauts listing 150+ free tutorials, live setups, performance examples, and learning resources from all major creators.
notes: THE master resource list. Contains links to tutorials from Cuckoo, Late Night Tips, Ned Rush, and many more. Start here for the broadest overview.

title: Elektron 103: Octatrack Dynamic Sampling - Complete Course
creator: Thavius Beck
description: Thavius Beck's 3-hour+ professional course covering Octatrack structure, step sequencer, sampling, editing, timestretching, and slicing. Beginner to intermediate.
notes: Professional structured course. Excellent for building solid foundations. Available on Ask.Video and macProVideo. Paid content.

title: Elektron 203: Octatrack MKII Advanced Sampling - Tutorial Course
creator: Thavius Beck
description: Thavius Beck's 19-tutorial advanced sampling course for Octatrack MK2. Covers recording, editing, slicing, BPM detection, step & live sequencing, neighbor machines, pickup machines, and resampling.
notes: Comprehensive professional course. Covers neighbor machines, pickup machines, and resampling in detail. Paid content.
